Simple Process

How It Works

Three steps to a clean yard — we keep it simple so you can enjoy your outdoor space without the hassle.

1

Pick Your Plan

Choose once a week or twice a week service. Select what works for your yard and your schedule.

2

We Come to You

We show up on your scheduled day and clean your yard thoroughly. No need to be home — we handle it.

3

Enjoy Your Yard

Come home to a clean, fresh yard every week. Pay every Saturday via Venmo — simple as that.

Service Plans

No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Just a clean yard every week at a price that makes sense.

Your second weekly visit will be on Tuesday.

You're on the list!

We'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your schedule and get you set up. Welcome to The Pooper Troopers — your yard is about to get a whole lot cleaner.

About Us

Montana Born.
Billings Proud.

The Pooper Troopers is a locally owned dog waste removal service started right here in Billings, Montana. We're not a franchise, not a corporation — just a neighbor who knows how exhausting it can be to keep up with the pet chores.

We serve Billings and Lockwood. Our referral program means the more neighbors you bring in, the more you save.

Where We Serve

Billings & Lockwood, MT

We serve Billings and Lockwood. If you have any questions about whether we cover your address, just give us a call or send a text — we're happy to help.
